path_note_ar: Phase 3 design framework complete — deliberation only، بدون scoring تلقائي. Phase 2 gap مسجّلة.
core_question_en: what kind of confidence is institutionally legitimate?

phase2_gap.waiver_rationale_ar: corpus AI جاهز (21/21) — Phase 3 design framework under Path B before 19 observation متبقية

constitutional_anchors.asymmetry_awareness_en: institutions are not epistemically symmetric — success confidence and failure confidence form through different psychological and institutional pathways
constitutional_anchors.B8-002_role: inflation contour — confidence inflates under high legibility
constitutional_anchors.B8-003_role: closure contour — failure stabilizes under degraded interpretive intake
central_restraint_phrases: evidence was interpreted and judged insufficient ≠ evidence ecology never cohered institutionally enough to become fully interpretable
low confidence must not silently harden into institutionally hardened failure certainty
confidence stabilization is partly shaped by evidence legibility — not only evidence volume
protected constitutional reminders of institutional fragility — not heuristics · not classifier seeds
constitutional_anchors.atlas_identity_en: constitutional memory of how institutions form certainty under partial observability — not evidence sufficiency catalogue

4.internal_asymmetry_note_en: Laith/Hussein tension illustrative only — asymmetry pair inside B4 not signed

constitutional_contour.label: surface_capture
constitutional_contour.rank_note_en: Third constitutional contour — epistemically precedes B8-002 and B8-003
constitutional_contour.core_insight_en: institutional certainty may stabilize around the wrong representational surface

illustrative_anchors.substitution: ليث الشطي — TextMesh Pro PDF as institutionally stabilized surface
illustrative_anchors.bounded_opacity: حسين السلامات — M under gated runtime + strong doc

central_restraint_phrases: the institution may assess what became representationally stable rather than what was evidentially most complete
the institution may assess the archive it could metabolize, not necessarily the archive that existed
certainty stabilizes around representational cleanliness rather than implementation ecology
institutional certainty is partly shaped by which surface becomes metabolically central

constitutional_contour_triad_v1.atlas_identity_en: constitutional memory of institutional epistemic deformation pathways under bounded observability and metabolization pressure
constitutional_contour_triad_v1.epistemic_precedence_note_en: B4-001 (which surface stabilizes) precedes B8-002 (inflation) and B8-003 (closure)
